_meta.note: DRIP matrix — review WEEKLY. Axes: makes money (vertical) x lights you up (horizontal).
_meta.framework: Production = do more · Replacement = automate/hire · Investment = invest in · Delegation = delegate away

replacement.label: Replacement
replacement.hint: money, low joy → automate / hire to replace

delegation.label: Delegation
delegation.hint: low money, low joy → delegate away
